name: Creamy Banana Pie
recipeIngredient: Juice and grated peel of 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in cold water; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
3. Gradually blend in the milk and egg yolks, cooking over low heat while stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly (about 20-25 minutes).
4. Remove from heat and stir in softened gelatin until dissolved.
5. Stir in butter and vanilla extract. Cover surface with plastic wrap and chill until no longer warm.
6. Slice the remaining bananas and fold them into the custard with whipped cream.
7. Spoon mixture into pie shell and chill until set (about 4-5 hours).
8. Shortly before serving, melt jelly over low heat in a saucepan.
9. Drain any excess banana liquid, pat dry, arrange on top of the pie, brush with melted jelly, sprinkle with grated lemon peel.
10. Serve immediately.
